indication: TAGRISSO is a kinase inhibitor indicated for the first-line treatment of adult patients with metastatic NSCLC whose tumors have EGFR exon 19 deletions or exon 21 L858R mutations, as detected by an FDA-approved test.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to osimertinib for the first-line treatment of adult patients with metastatic non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) whose tumors have epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) exon 19 deletions or exon 21 L858R mutations, as detected by an FDA-approved test.
raw_biomarkers: EGFR exon 19 deletions or exon 21 L858R mutations

document.name: Tagrisso (osimertinib) [package insert]. FDA.
